title: viburnum lantana f. variegatum
intro: Viburnum lantana f. variegatum is a variant of the Viburnum lantana plant, commonly known as wayfaring tree, which is a deciduous shrub native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions, due to its anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Viburnum lantana f. variegatum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Viburnum lantana f. variegatum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made from the plant's leaves, flowers, or roots.
